zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Woodruffe於1472年出生在英國越可爾伍利時，她的父親Sir Richard Woodroffe32歲，母親Jane Wortley31歲。她於1493年與Matthew Wentworth在英國越可爾伍利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1537年3月10日在英國越可爾韋斯特 布頓享年65歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 登斯坦 在 馮 韋斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Woodruffe于1472年出生在英国越可爾伍利时，她的父亲Sir Richard Woodroffe32岁，母亲Jane Wortley31岁。她于1493年与Matthew Wentworth在英国越可爾伍利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1537年3月10日在英国越可爾韋斯特 布頓享年65岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 登斯坦 在 馮 韋斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Woodruffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Woodruff
meanings: English: from Middle English woderove ‘woodruff, sweet woodruff’ (Old English wudurofe), a sweet-scented plant. The leaves of the plant have a sweet smell and the surname may also have been a nickname for one who used it as a perfume, or perhaps an ironical nickname for a malodorous person. Alternatively, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived at or near a place where woodruff grew. There may have been some confusion with Woodrow .

History: Two English families brought the name Woodruff to the American colonies: those of Matthew Woodruff and of John and Ann Woodruffe. The latter migrated to Lynn, MA, from Kent, and moved to Southampton, Long Island, NY, before 1640. John and Ann's many descendants were established in NJ, NC, and SC by 1790. The city of Woodruff, SC, is named for this family. The name is variously spelled Woodrove, Woodroffe, Woodruffe, Woodrough, and Woodruff in colonial records.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Woodruffe was born in 1472, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Woodroffe, was 32 and her mother, Jane Wortley, was 31. She married Matthew Wentworth in 1493, in Woolley, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 10 March 1537, in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Woodruffe est née en 1472, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Woodroffe, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Jane Wortley, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Matthew Wentworth en 1493, à Woolley, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 mars 1537, à West Bretton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Woodruffe 1472 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Woodroffe 32 und ihre Mutter Jane Wortley 31. Sie hat 1493 in Woolley, Yorkshire, England Matthew Wentworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. März 1537 im Alter von 65 Jahren in West Bretton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Woodruffe è nata il nel 1472 nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Woodroffe, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Jane Wortley, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Matthew Wentworth nel 1493, nel Woolley, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 10 marzo 1537, nel West Bretton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex, England.

ko.Bretton Hall, West Bretton, West Yorkshi: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 웨스트 브레턴
ko.London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 던스탠 인 테 웨스트
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Woodruffe(이)가 1472년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Woodroffe(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Wortley(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1493년 영국 요르크실르 보리에서 Matthew Wentworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1537년 3월 10일 영국 요르크실르 웨스트 브레턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 던스탠 인 테 웨스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Woodruffe nasceu em 1472, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Woodroffe, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Jane Wortley, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Matthew Wentworth em 1493, em Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de março de 1537, em West Bretton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex: лондон ст дунстань ин т вест, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Woodruffe родилась в 1472 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Woodroffe было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Jane Wortley, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Matthew Wentworth в 1493 г. в местности вулли, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 10 марта 1537 г. в местности вест бреттон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности лондон ст дунстань ин т вест, миддлесекс, Англия.

Se casó con Matthew Wentworth en 1493, en Woolley, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1537, en West Bretton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en London St Dunstan in the West, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
